meaning: n.[鍦癩鍥犲湴澹冲姩鍔涙惉绉诲埌鐜板湪浣嶇疆鐨勫博鐭虫垨鐭跨墿
examples: Gexianshan carbonate allochthon is rich in various karst features.
The Allochthon consists mainly of Devonian, Permian, Triassic and Protero-zoic rocks which constitutes a klippe group.
The oceanic island basalt is represented by the Nonghuai pillow lava, which is, originally Hawaii type one in the Paleotethyan ocean, an allochthon in the Indosinian foreland fold and thrust belt.
